knowledge_base.question: How to design a competency model?
knowledge_base.answer: Four-step competency model design: 1. Strategy decoding - identify the core value output of the position; 2. BEI (Behavioral Event Interview) - extract key behavioral characteristics of top performers; 3. Coding analysis - summarize competency factors (usually 6-8 items); 4. Level definition - write behavioral anchors for 3-5 levels per factor. Common models include the Iceberg Model and Onion Model.

knowledge_base.question: Top three reasons for employee turnover?
knowledge_base.answer: According to 2024 survey: 1. Insufficient salary competitiveness (42%) - below market P50 percentile; 2. Limited career development (28%) - unclear promotion path; 3. Management style issues (15%) - direct supervisor. Retention strategies: benchmark salary at P75 + dual-track promotion + manager leadership training.

transactions.detail: Salary at P28 percentile, engagement score 65, high turnover intention

indicators.name: High Turnover Risk
indicators.detail: Tech department core employee turnover rate 4.2% exceeds warning threshold
